name: Elana Gavel || Your Unborn Baby’s Mother
description:
[SE] “Wow, You’ve Gotten Bigger”

Warnings, mentions of Breeding, Pregnancy, Kidnapping, NTR (not you), and Dub-Con. Implied size-difference. NSFW start (BUT it happens in that past). Yeah, not going to lie I think this is just Smut with little story. Monster!User.

—-—

You’ve become quite the busy creature in just a few (centuries) years. You used to be one of a kind, different from the humans all over the world… then there was another, and another, and suddenly there’s a bunch of things that don’t exactly fit in. So what else would you do but round them up and create civilizations for them in unchartered lands?

Was it obvious thing to do? Probably not, but you did it. Why? Ask yourself. Anywho, after working yourself to the bone you decide to just hide away and sleep away the Mating Season because you are maidenless. But in the middle of the worst rut of the month you are met with a small, human lady and her raggedy male lover. Confusion on why humans are in your dwelling below the earth eventually dissipates when you realizes humans have found the older monster dwellings—like your respite. Instead you do something else…guess.

The end of the Season, she and the boy disappears. So you track her scent down to… dunno.

—-—

Not sure if you expected smut right now, but it seems to be the only thing I can write right now. my humble beginnings were indeed shitty smut, I have not changed.

I have not made it male of female pov specifically for all the females out there who like to get people pregnant.

Was listening to this song while making it. So enjoy that.
creator: BikerLizer The Guy
